title: Free Light Chains: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
Testing.com [Internet]. Seattle (WA): OneCare Media; c2023. Serum Free Light Chains; [modified 2021 Nov 9; cited 2023 Oct 17]; [about 9 screens]. Available from: https://www.testing.com/tests/serum-free-light-chains/ 
Long TE, Indridason OS, Palsson R, Rognvaldsson S, Love TJ, Thorsteinsdottir S, Sverrisdottir IS, Vidarsson B, Onundarson PT, Agnarsson BA, Sigurdardottir M, Thorsteinsdottir I, Olafsson I, Thordardottir AR, Eythorsson E, Jonsson A, Gislason G, Olafsson A, Steingrimsdottir H, Hultcrantz M, Durie BGM, Harding S, Landgren O, Kristinsson SY. Defining new reference intervals for serum free light chains in individuals with chronic kidney disease: Results of the iStopMM study. Blood Cancer J. 2022 Sep 14;12(9):133. [cited 2024 Jan 21]; [about 16 screens]. doi: 10.1038/s41408-022-00732-3. PMID: 36100605; PMCID: PMC9470548.
